Su: The soul (atma), self, ego, vitality, health, authority, father and the will to shine.
Mo: The mind (manas), emotions, moods, instinct, memory, the mother and inner receptivity.
Ma: Energy, courage, drive, passion, discipline, competition, siblings and physical strength.
Me: Intellect, communication, wit, logic, learning, commerce and skill with words and numbers.
Ju: Wisdom, knowledge, faith, ethics, expansion, fortune, teachers, children and higher purpose.
Ve: Love, beauty, art, pleasure, refinement, harmony, relationships, luxury and the marriage partner.
Sa: Discipline, karma, patience, hard work, limitation, longevity and the hard lessons of time.
Ra: Worldly desire, obsession, ambition, innovation, the unconventional and karmic hunger for more.
Ke: Detachment, spirituality, past-life karma, intuition, liberation (moksha) and letting go.
